titleStmt.title: SII 26.685: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 685. (A.R. No. 640 of 1909.) KŌNĒRIRĀJAPURAM, THANJAVUR TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Vijaya-Rājēndradēva (Rājādhirāja): Year 36, Kaṟkaṭa (Āḍi), Thursday, Hastam = 1053 A.D., July 22.

summary.p: This inscription which is damaged in some places contains the praśasti of the king beginning with Tiṅgaḷēr taru, etc.

It states that the Peruṁguṟi sabhai of Pāvaikkuḍi, a Brahmadēyam in Veṇṇāḍu in Uyyakoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu, assembled under the tamarind tree on the bank of the Sutamallivāykkāl, decided to give lands, made tax-free, for (worship and offerings) to the image of a certain deity (name not clear), set up in the temple of the god Tirunallamuḍaiya-mahādēvar at Tirunallam, a Brahmadēyam in Veṇṇāḍu in the same [vaḷa*]nāḍu. The land was given to the temple as iṟaiyili (made tax-free) on receipt from the temple a sum of 135 kāśu plus 3(1/4) mā kāśu. It is stated that the sabhai had agreed to bear all the expenses connected with the land, and that permission to get this record engraved on the temple and on copper-sheet was given to the temple servants. After this a long list of the names of the members of the sabhai is appended.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī .
tiṅkaḷer taru
taṉṟoṅkal veṇkuṭaik
kiḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malarma
kaḷ puṇarntu
ceṅkolocci
karuṅkali kaṭintu
tantayyar tamaiyar tampi
yar tanṟiru mañcuḷan
ṟiruvarai maṇimuṭi cū
ṭṭi kannikāvalar teṉṉa
var muvaruḷ vāṇakammiruva
rkaḷikik kānakamoruvaṟ
kaḷittu porucilaiccera
laṉ velaikeḻu kān=taḷūr
cālai kalamaṟuppit tilaṅkaikkaracaiyum Alaṅkal
vallapaṉaiyum kaṉṉakucciyar kāvalakonpoṉ
ṉaṇi muṭittalai taṉṉaṭippaṭai Evi kanṉāṭakarvi
ṭukaṭalkari puraḷa tanṉāṭayil tamiḻparaṇi koṇ
ṭonṉār vacciraneṭuvāḷ viccayaṉ miruneḷitañci Oṭa
tanvañciyay paṭaiyāl Āṅkavan pitāvai mātā
voṭum catāmali viṅkunir pūṇṭu veñcamattakappaṭa
Āhavamallan payattoṭum varaviṭu moṟṟarai �
vap piṭippittāṅkavar mārvil Āhavamallan
ṅka mañciṉaneṉkeḻuti celutti piṉṉai
taṉ pulikko
ṭi paṭaiñaroṭṭa
toraṇavaracai kaṭa
vvā
yeṉṟu tuṟai munṟilu mu
ṟai puṉalūṭṭi Āṅkavan Etta kiriyil
Oṅkiyaṟuḻuvaiyateḻuti Uyarn=ta
[jayastampam] Eḻil peṟa niṟutti
tan kaḻal paṇin=toḻuku
maraicarkaḷoṭu ce
ṇṭāṭi por virakkoṭi
Oṭu tiyākakkoṭi Eṭutta
tonnalar kavarn=ta ton
netip piṟakkamum Iraviravala
vanviṭu taṇṭattukkavan ve
l puravi nuḷampanum kāḷitāsa
num vaḷappan=tāṟ cāmuṇṭanum
porkkum mayanum villavarājanum
Enumivar mutali nālvarum tiriyaka
l peruneti kavantu kūccaranuppa
ḷan Oṇmalarp pacun=talai tār taṟai
yilp pantaṭintu munkoṇṭu ta
kaivan tappai muntaippa Appa
kai cekuttuppaḷan vaḻiyil tappilvaraicar kaḷāṅkatumiṭa māṭṭā
tu tanpūṅkaḻal caraṇeṉap pukutata viraṇavaṟkaruḷi taṭamuṭik kiṭaṅkuṭut tirun
ta taṭaṅkavaḷa tappaiyai paṟittuṭaṉ koṭupontu pinpa
ṟittulaintu Añciyu mañcātānāy veñcamaṅkaruti viṭavan
ta peṟkaṭikaḷ munperitavaṟkurai varaintu tān cātta Aṟai kaḻal mu
raicu munpamar piraṭṭaril Oruvanaiyp peṇṇuṭaippaṭutti O
ruvaṉai Añcu cikaippaṭa ciṟaippittu nonteḻil Āhavamalliyu
m Āhavamallanum menṟu piyar riṭuvittu Avaṉ viṭutta peṟ
koṭikaḷḷuṭaṉ pokkippukkuṭaviṭṭa ni viṭātu ceṉṟa n mutu
kiṭap porutu tankatappattaṇṭin mun In Oru tamiyan nenakkayyalai kaṭalalikkalliyāṇa puramennun ton
nakar tu(tu)kaḷ Eḻuttu kaippittu Araicuṟai karumāḷikai poṭiyākki yāṅkatu kākka niṟatana pūṅkaḻalaṭavi rākuttan
mutaliyar kaṭakkaḷiṟṟaraicaro muppattaiyvar kari Oṭum parioṭum p porutu poṅku vijairājendranenṟu vi
jai Abhiṣekañ ceytu cirkeḻu viśvalokattu viḷaṅku manuneṟi niṉṟa śvametañ cey
tu Araicu viṟṟirun=ta jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻan Uyanta perum pukaḻ kovirājakesari Enparākiya peru Eṇṭicai Ellām niṟain=ta kirtti vijairā
jendradevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 6 Āvatu Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭu brahmadeyam pāvaikkuṭip peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyom Ivvāṭṭai kaṟka
ṭaka nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu viyāḻakkiḻamai peṟṟa Attattināṉṟu nammūr cuttamalli vāykkāl karaiyil rājendracoḻan puḷikkiḻ kūṭṭaṅ kuṟai
varakkūṭi Iruntu Innāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭu brahmadeyam tirunalattu tirunalamuṭaiya mahādevar koyilil Eḻuntaruḷi Irukkum tirumeni catti tevarkku tirucce
nnaṭaip puṟamā
jivākkālukkum śrīmaturān=takavākkālukkum śrīcoḻakeraḷavāykkālukku vaṭakkum Innilam Arai
ye Oru māvukkum kiḻpāṟkellai kaḻutuvan śrīkaṇṭan Āṭavalān nilattukku meṟku tenpāṟkellai śrīrājendracoḻa vāykkālukku vaṭakkum
miypāṟkellai śrīmaturān=takavatikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai pūṅkuṭi vāykkālukku teṟkum Āka Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellaiyil Akappaṭṭa nilam
Araiye cinnamum Innimaiñcetu
Ittevarkku nāṅkaḷ Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭut
ta nilamāvatu śrīmaturān=takavatikku meṟku co
ḻakeraḷavāykkālukku vaṭakku nālāṅ kaṇṇāṟ
ṟu mutuccirattu nilam Irumāvaraic cinnamum I
tukku kiḻpāṟkellai śrīmaturān=takavatikku
meṟku tenpāṟkellai kamutuvan śrīkaṇṭanna
ṭikaḷ nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkel
lai pūccāli tirunāvukkaraiyan veṇkāṭan
nilattukkum kāśyapan veṇkāṭan Aḻakiyā
n nilattukkum kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai
kellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Irumāvarai ciṅkam
Innamayiṅkeya I
kuṭutta nilattinilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai kaḻu
tuvan śrīkaṇṭan nāṭalan nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkel
lai kamutuvaṉ śrīkaṇṭan Āṭavalān nilattukkey vaṭakkum mel
pārkkellai Ittevarkku Iṟaiiliceytu kuṭuttanilattukke
kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai pūṅkuṭivāykkālukku teṟkum Āka Iv
vicaitta perunāṉkellaiyilum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam ku
kai Āṟaraiye mummāvarai tenkai vaṭakai mukkolumāka
vanta kuḻi Irupate Araimāvināl van=tanila
m Araikkāṇi mun=tirikaikkiḻ
nālumāvum Ākat taṭi munṟināl va
n=tanilam Araiye mummāvarai
Araikkāṇi mun=tirikai kiḻnālumā
mummāvaraiye Araikkāṇi mun=tīrikai kiḻ
nālumāvinālum tanātin kiḻmaṭakki van=tanilam mākāṇi mun=tīrikai kiḻ
Araiye Orumākkāṇi Innilam mākāṇi mun=tīrikaikiḻ Araiyemākkāṇiyā
l māttāl kācu nūṟāka van=takācu nūṟṟu muppattañce munṟumākkāṇi Ikkācu
nūṟṟu muppattañce munṟum mākkāṇiyum Ittevar paṇṭārattu sabhaiyo
m koṇṭu Innilam Araiye mummāvaraiye Araikkāṇi muntirikai kiḻnālu māvum Ittevar
kkiṟai Iliceytu kuṭuttu Innila
m candrātittavarai nāṅkaḷe Iṟai Iṟu
kka kaṭavomāka Iṟaiili ceytu kuṭut
tom peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyom Innila
m Iyāṇṭu 3 10 6 vatu mutal Innilaṅ
kaḷukku candrātittaval Iṟai Uḷḷiṭṭu ti
ruvācalil pon=ta kuṭimai veḷḷān ve
ṭṭiyum Uḷḷiṭṭu Epperppaṭṭitum veṇṭu
vatellām sabhaiyom Iṟukkak kaṭavo
mākavum Innilam tirunalam Uṭai
yār koyilil kallilum cempi
lum Ittevar kanmikaḷe veṭṭuvittu
koḷḷap peruvārkaḷākavum Āka I
pparicu Ikkācu koṇṭu Innilaṅkaḷu
kku Iṟaiili ceytu kuṭu
ttom peruṅkuṟi sa
bhaiyom Ikkuṟi Uḷḷi
runtu patta ki divāka
rakkiramavittan paṇiyā
lum kāśyapan veṇkā
ṭan Aḻakiyān paṇi
yālum
ntu sa
vittan paṇi
p paṇiyālum paṇi
kku mal I
n caṭaiyan tevanāna
ṟaimpatin ma ṟapā
nen Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ip
ṭi Aṟiveṉ
tanu
ta vikkirama
ippaṭi Aṟiven pe
kiḻa divākarakkiramavittanen
ippaṭi Aṟiven śivabrāhmaṇa
n kāśyapan panakkanākiya civatevapaṭ
ṭanen Ippaṭi Aṟiven
van nakkan tiruvikkiramanen Ip
paṭi Aṟiven puṟattu
vabramaṉu kiramavitta
yadeva
paṭṭan civa
rāyaṇapaṭṭanum
Eḻunnūṟṟuvanu
cāttanum Uḷḷi
l Uṭaiyom nicata
mpaṭi māṟṟāvatu nā
ḻi Arici Aṟunāḻikkum nā
Amutukkum ney Amutu
mutukkum ney Amutu
tu viṟakukkum tiru
I 3 10 6 tirupparicāra
I � A nā+ I
koṭṭaikku I 100 2 10 7
Innilam candrātittavarai
Anupavittu nipan=tañ ceyak kaṭavo
māy tevar Amutu ceyta ce
koṇṭu tevar koyil kākka kaṭavo
mākavum śrīpanmāheśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 26.685 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
